service.name: LanguageTool API
service.description_for_ai: Free grammar and spell checker. Supports 25+ languages including Russian, German, French, Spanish. Detects grammar errors, punctuation mistakes, style issues. Free: 20 req/min 20KB text.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check text for grammar, spelling, punctuation and style errors. Returns list of mistakes with suggestions.

language.description: Language code: en-US, ru-RU, de-DE, fr, es, it, pt-BR

agent_hints.language_codes: English: en-US or en-GB. Russian: ru-RU. German: de-DE. French: fr. Spanish: es.
agent_hints.free: Free tier is very generous — 20 req/min with 20KB text per request is enough for most use cases.
agent_hints.self_host: LanguageTool is open source and can be self-hosted for unlimited use.
